rag_rules: Preserve existing AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
Use visible identifiers when referring to component ports in AGREE contracts
Ground all AGREE variables in the current AADL model or explicit declarations
generic_rules: Maintain component type contracts in type scopes and implementation contracts in implementation scopes
Avoid using AADL property names directly in AGREE expressions without explicit ports or constants
Place assumptions and guarantees in the most specific valid scope for the referenced features
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks for AGREE contracts
Declare equations with `eq name : type = expression;`
anti_patterns: Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through variables or outputs
Avoid placing assumptions or guarantees in scopes where referenced features are not visible
